title: Resolve Actionable Radiology Findings
summary: Parse finalized radiology report text, detect actionable findings, verify closure status, and route the next step.
problem_statement: Actionable findings are often mentioned in reports but not consistently closed with outreach, ordering, or scheduling.

inputs.name: report_text
inputs.description: Final report text containing the actionable finding.

inputs.name: patient_summary
inputs.description: Basic patient and encounter context used to anchor the recommendation.

inputs.name: completion_state
inputs.description: Whether a follow-up action has already been completed.

inputs.name: owner_context
inputs.description: Optional ordering clinician, PCP, radiology navigator, or service owner for the finding.

inputs.name: notification_log
inputs.description: Optional indication that a clinician, patient, or navigator was already notified.

rule_sets.summary: If the report contains actionable language and no closure is recorded, queue review and next-step planning.
If the report requests same-day, emergent, or immediate follow-up, escalate to urgent review before closure drafting.

actions.label: Create review item
actions.description: Queue a reviewer task for closure verification.

actions.label: Draft diagnostic order suggestion
actions.description: Prepare the likely next diagnostic order or referral suggestion.

actions.label: Draft scheduling outreach
actions.description: Prepare a scheduling or navigator outreach next step.

examples: The report recommends a dedicated renal mass MRI for further evaluation of an incidental lesion.
Short-interval CT follow-up in 3 months is advised for a suspicious pulmonary opacity.
Possible cord compression is described and same-day MRI is recommended.
Please check whether this radiology report has already been closed.
